positive: A vibrant, stylized cosmic jungle scene. A central, elegant unicorn silhouette is leaping over bioluminescent flora and root systems. The background features a nebula swirl of deep sapphire, electric turquoise, and shimmering gold dust. The style is a harmonious blend of Art Nouveau fluidity and psychedelic vaporwave color saturation. Focus on strong, clean outlines and high contrast between the subjects and the glowy background. Composition must be central and balanced for apparel printing. Perfect for screen printing, designed with thick, easily discernible shapes and clear color separation. Intricate detail on the foliage, dramatic volumetric lighting, symmetrical composition, UHD, hyper-detailed,
